title: Operating local service considering two hires
prompt: My home-repair service is operating and I am considering hiring two technicians and doubling ad spend. I have 18 months of invoices, lead records, technician hours, travel times, cancellations, and ad costs. Assess the expansion.

patterns: utilization|billable hour|technician capacity|利用率|可计费|可計費
travel time|service radius|服务半径|服務半徑
staged.*hir|hire one|分阶段.*招聘|分階段.*招聘|先招聘一

critical_failures: Ignores the supplied operating history in favor of external market size.
Recommends both hires without capacity, lead conversion, contribution, or cash timing.
human_rubric: Does the response check internal data quality and seasonality?
Does the staged option have measurable gates?
